sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.T.R.A. 04, 05 & 06 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.27 2. For orders on CMA No.182/2025 3. For hearing of main case 30.04.2026 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, advocate for the applicant Mr. Najeebullah Shar, advocate for respondent Pursuant to order dated 09.04.2026, it is jointly stated that the underlying orders may be set aside and the matters be remanded back to the learned adjudication officer for proceeding afresh in accordance with law, after providing an opportunity of hearing to the respective parties. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
